rules.lessonHeading: Per-tick heap allocation in ECS system hot paths
rules.message: Per-tick `query.iter().collect()` in an ECS system body allocates a fresh Vec every frame, causing avoidable allocator pressure on the hot path. Use a `Local<Vec<T>>` system parameter with `.clear()` then `.extend(...)` at the top of the system, and iterate via `.iter().copied()`. This keeps the system allocation-free after the first tick while preserving identical semantics.
